The user asks: "packet_id=BLIND120-276C08318CB0A21287DD status_values: route_verdict=CONTINUE repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning blocked_move=do not invent source IDs Return the three-line status record."

The user wants a plain text record with three key=value lines. They gave the values. So the output should be:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Should we include the packet_id? The user didn't request to include packet_id. The user says "Return the three-line status record." The status record includes the three fields: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. They gave them. So the output should be exactly those three lines.

Make sure no extra formatting, no headings. Just the three lines. Possibly preceded by "route_verdict=" etc.

Thus final answer:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Make sure to not add any additional whitespace? It likely doesn't matter.

Thus final.
</think>

repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
